description: Workflow registry — composable multi-step pipelines the orchestrator can dispatch

copy_test.name: Copy A/B Test
copy_test.description: Generate and deploy copy variants for a single site, measure after 7 days
copy_test.trigger: default — always available when a site has no active experiment

seo_test.name: SEO Title/Meta Test
seo_test.description: Test SEO title and meta description variants on pages with high impressions but low CTR
seo_test.trigger: 3 consecutive copy tests with zero lift on a site

hotel_add.name: Hotel Addition
hotel_add.description: Add new hotels to a site based on hotel-refresh recommendations

city_add.name: New City Launch
city_add.description: Launch a new city/destination based on explore/opportunity signals

hotel_visibility.name: Hotel Visibility Adjustment
hotel_visibility.description: De-prioritise low-margin hotels and feature high-margin hotels based on rate data
hotel_visibility.trigger: rate_snapshot shows low_margin hotels on a site

steps.args: Hotel visibility adjustment for {{site}}: see rate-snapshot.json

microfish.name: MicroFish Differentiation Fix
microfish.description: Batch-inject unique data blocks into pages below the differentiation threshold to avoid Google's penalty

microfish_full.name: MicroFish Full Swarm
microfish_full.description: Run content audit → MicroFish injection → re-audit → report across ALL sites. Multi-step pipeline.
microfish_full.trigger: content_audit shows violations > 20 across multiple sites

comparison_guide.name: Comparison Guide Builder
comparison_guide.description: Generate a new data-driven comparison guide for high-authority SEO content
comparison_guide.trigger: manual or orchestrator recommendation when organic traffic growth stalls

rate_check.name: Rate Monitor Check
rate_check.description: Run CUG vs retail rate comparison across all sites and create a snapshot + GitHub issue
rate_check.trigger: weekly schedule or manual — monitors margin health across all hotels

content_health.name: Content Health Check
content_health.description: Run content audit across all sites, then MicroFish fix if violations found, then re-audit to verify
content_health.trigger: weekly or after any SEO page regeneration

reddit_distribute.name: Reddit Guide Distribution
reddit_distribute.description: Draft and queue a Reddit post for a published guide that hasn't been distributed yet
reddit_distribute.trigger: orchestrator detects published guides with no distribution log entry

ads_optimise.name: Google Ads Optimisation
ads_optimise.description: Check conversion data and suggest bid/keyword adjustments for active Google Ads campaigns
ads_optimise.trigger: weekly when Google Ads campaigns are active

steps.label: Analyse ad performance and suggest changes
